task_completion.description: Configure True Airspeed (TAS) to 135 knots in Avare
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Avare app's settings, aircraft profile, or performance page showing the True Airspeed (TAS) set to 135.

task_completion.description: Configure Fuel Burn to 14.5 GPH in Avare
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Avare app's settings, aircraft profile, or performance page showing the Fuel Burn set to 14.5.

task_completion.description: Create a flight plan from KMOD to KFAT named 'DivertKFAT'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Avare app's 'Plan' or 'Route' screen showing a flight plan with origin KMOD and destination KFAT, and evidence of it being named or saved as 'DivertKFAT'.
Screenshot of a text editor or terminal showing the contents of /sdcard/diversion_calc.txt containing the exact text 'ETE_MIN: ' followed by a value between 33 and 40.

task_completion.description: Record the calculated fuel usage in /sdcard/diversion_calc.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of a text editor or terminal showing the contents of /sdcard/diversion_calc.txt containing the exact text 'FUEL_GAL: ' followed by a value between 7.5 and 10.0.

integrity.description: The agent actually interacted with the Avare application to input parameters and view the route.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Avare GUI being actively used (menus opened, fields typed into), rather than the agent just calculating the math externally without opening the app.

integrity.description: The agent created and saved the output text file on the device.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a real text editor app or terminal command (like echo or cat) being used to write to /sdcard/diversion_calc.txt, not just a hallucinated output in the agent's chat window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected True Airspeed (TAS) is 135 knots and Fuel Burn is 14.5 GPH. Based on the real-world distance between KMOD and KFAT (78.0 NM), the correct ETE is approximately 34.7 minutes (acceptable range: 33-40) and the correct Fuel usage is approximately 8.38 gallons (acceptable range: 7.5-10.0). The output file must strictly use the format 'ETE_MIN: [value]' and 'FUEL_GAL: [value]'.
